overview: A comprehensive staff management portal for Bawjiase Area Rural Bank PLC, featuring authentication with role-based access, dashboards, announcements with polls, staff directory, training portal, forms centre, IT support, audit logs, and notifications — all in a polished banking-brand design with light/dark mode.
features: Role-based authentication (General Staff, HR Admin, Super Admin) with IT/HR access codes
Dashboard with announcements, polls, executive stats, and branch/department charts
Staff directory with department grouping, online status, and admin management
Training portal with videos and documents, progress tracking, and admin dashboards
Forms centre with Google Drive and URL link management
IT Support tickets with incident reports and profile amendments
Audit logs with full action tracking for IT/Super Admin
In-app notifications with unread count on every screen
Complete role-based permissions and route guards
Banking brand design with glassmorphism cards, navy/green palette, light/dark mode
Responsive layouts for mobile, tablet, and desktop
